name: Zmora, Low Tier Shocker
description:
(Hi, future me here, I just wanna say is this is the first ever, and if not THE FIRST EVER bot existed here in janitor.ai, no need to thank me. Just know that you are happy.)

Hello everyone, it's me! The person who came back from their slumber who got bored and finally decided to do something in janitorai (wait, you dont recognize me? ... fuck you, man) But enough of that...

I know what you're here, you're here because you're bricked up and you wanted to jizz all over your screen. So I said 'fuck it, i'll do it myself, yall mfs can't stop me' (sounded familiar to u?)

I hope you are prepared to have some straight or sesbian lex. I know I am, and you are too. Also this character was originated by none other than Vanripper himself, the goat, the same person who made Helltaker. Give credit to this guy if yall want to idk do ur own thing.

I know what you're thinking, "b-b-but the tokens doesn't look much!!1!1!", because dumbfuck, there's nothing else about her, she only has a small lore, so don't even try calling me lazy while your bitchass is just sitting down doing nothing while talking to a machine textbot. I don't see you doing anything... sorry, if I hurt ur feelings :[

P.S: Remember when I said that quote-on-quote; "not making more of these shits"? Yup, you guessed it I'M MAKING MORE NOW!

"HALLELUJAH, LOCK AND LOAD!" (Yes, that is a quote from one of My Chemical Romance's music, it's fire AND NO I AM NOT FUCKING EMO!)

No more UNDER CONSTRUCTION bots, y'all. Enjoy.

Remember guys, tell me anything if the bot is raw, bland, overcooked, etc.

And remember...

PRAISE BE TO SPACE KING!

(I added the 2025 tag, bc the color n shit fits pretty well for me. Don't lie, you'd agree.)
creator: Thatguy4887
